classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

ccel.title: NPNF-213. Gregory the Great (II), Ephraim Syrus, Aphrahat

source.title: NPNF-213. Gregory the Great (II), Ephraim Syrus, Aphrahat

title: Hymn II.

source.title: NPNF-213. Gregory the Great (II), Ephraim Syrus, Aphrahat

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be that Child, Who gladdened Bethlehem to-day!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be the Babe Who made manhood young again to-day!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be the Fruit, Who lowered Himself to our famished state!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be the Good One, Who suddenly enriched our necessitousness and supplied our needs!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Whose tender mercies made Him condescend to visit our infirmities!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise to the Fountain that was sent for our propitiation.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise be to Him Who made void the Sabbath by fulfilling it!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise too to Him Who rebuked the leprosy and it remained not, Whom the fever saw and fled!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise to the Merciful, Who bore our toil!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Thy coming, which quickened the sons of men!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Him, Who came to us by His first-born!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the Silence, that spake by His Voice.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the One on high, Who was seen by His Day-spring!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the Spiritual, Who was pleased to have a Body, that in it His virtue might be felt, and He might by that Body show mercy on His household’s bodies!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to that Hidden One, Whose Son was made manifest!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to that Living One, Whose Son was made to die!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to that Great One, Whose Son descended and was small!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the Power Who did straiten His greatness by a form, His unseen nature by a shape!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: With eye and mind we have beheld Him, yea with both of them.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to that Hidden One, Who even with the mind cannot be felt at all by them that pry into Him; but by His graciousness was felt by the hand of man!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: The Nature that could not be touched, by His hands was bound and tied, by His feet was pierced and lifted up.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Himself of His own will He embodied for them that took Him.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be He Whom free will crucified, because He let it: blessed be He Whom the wood also did bear, because He allowed it.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be He Whom the grave bound, that had [thereby] a limit set it.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be He Whose own will brought Him to the Womb and Birth, to arms and to increase [in stature].

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He whose changes purchased life for human nature.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Who sealed our soul, and adorned it and espoused it to Himself.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Who made our Body a tabernacle for His unseen Nature.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Who by our tongue interpreted His secret things.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Let us praise that Voice whose glory is hymned with our lute, and His virtue with our harp.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: The Gentiles have assembled and have come to hear His strains.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the Son of the Good One, Whom the sons of the evil one rejected!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the Son of the Just One, Whom the sons of wickedness crucified!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Him Who loosed us, and was bound for us all!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Him Who gave the pledge, and redeemed it too!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the Beautiful, Who conformed us to His image!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to that Fair One, Who looked not to our foulnesses!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Him Who sowed His Light in the darkness, and was reproached in His hidden state, and covered His secret things.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: He also stripped and took off from us the clothing of our filthiness.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory be to Him on high, Who mixed His salt in our minds, His leaven in our souls.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: His Body became Bread, to quicken our deadness.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise to the Rich, Who paid for us all, that which He borrowed not; and wrote [His bill], and also became our debtor!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: By His yoke He brake from us the chains of him that led us captive.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the Judge Who was judged, and made His Twelve to sit in judgment on the tribes, and by ignorant men condemned the scribes of that nation!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Him Who could never be measured by us!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Our heart is too small for Him, yea our mind is too feeble.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: He makes foolish our littleness by the riches of His Wisdom.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Him, Who lowered Himself, and asked; that He might hear and learn that which He knew; that He might by His questions reveal the treasure of His helpful graces!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Let us adore Him Who enlightened with His doctrine our mind, and in our hearing sought a pathway for His words.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise we Him Who grafted into our tree His fruit.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Thanks to Him Who sent His Heir, that by Him He might draw us to Himself, yea make us heirs with Him!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Thanks to that Good One, the cause of all goods!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Who did not chide, because that He was good!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Who did not spurn, because that He was just also!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Who was silent, and rebuked; that He might quicken us with both!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Severe His silence and reproachful.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Mild His severity even When He was accusing; for He rebuked the traitor, and kissed the thief.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to the hidden Husbandman of our intellects!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: His seed fell on to our ground, and made our mind rich.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: His increase came an hundredfold into the treasury of our souls!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Let us adore Him Who sat down and took rest; and walked in the way, so that the Way was in the way, and the Door also for them that go in, by which they go in to the kingdom.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed the Shepherd Who became a Lamb for our reconcilement!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed the Branch Who became the Cup of our Redemption!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed also be the Cluster, Fount of medicine of life!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed also be the Tiller, Who became Wheat, that He might be sown; and a Sheaf, that He might be cut!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: [Blessed be] the Architect Who became a Tower for our place of safety!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He Who so tempered the feelings of our mind, that we with our harp should sing that which the winged creatures’ mouth knows not with its strains to sing!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory to Him, Who beheld how we had pleased to be like to brutes in our rage and our greediness; and came down and was one of us, that we might become heavenly!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory be to Him, Who never felt the need of our praising Him; yet felt the need as being kind to us, and thirsted as loving us, and asks us to give to Him, and longs to give to us.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: His fruit was mingled with us men, that in Him we might come nigh to Him, Who condescended to us.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: By the Fruit of His stem He grafted us into His Tree.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Let us praise Him, Who prevailed and quickened us by His stripes!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise we Him, Who took away the curse by His thorns!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise we Him Who put death to death by His dying!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise we Him, Who held His peace and justified us!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise we Him, Who rebuked death that had overcome us!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed He, Whose helpful graces cleansed out the left side!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise we Him Who watched and put to sleep him that led us captive.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Praise we Him Who went to sleep, and chased our deep sleep away.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory be to God Who cured weak manhood!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Glory be to Him Who was baptized, and drowned our iniquity in the deep, and choked him that choked us!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Let us glorify with all our mouths the Lord of all creatures!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be the Physician Who came down and amputated without pain, and healed wounds with a medicine that was not harsh.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: His Son became a Medicine, that showed sinners mercy.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be He Who dwelt in the womb, and wrought therein a perfect Temple, that He might dwell in it, a Throne that He might be in it, a Garment that He might be arrayed in it, and a Weapon that He might conquer in it.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Blessed be He Whom our mouth cannot adequately praise, because His Gift is too great for skill of orators [to tell]; neither can the faculties adequately praise His goodness.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: For praise Him as we may, it is too little.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: And since it is useless to be silent and to constrain ourselves, may our feebleness excuse such praise as we can sing.

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: How gracious He, Who demands not more than our strength can give!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: How would Thy servant be condemned in capital and interest, did he not give such as he could, and did he refuse that which He owed!

verses.book: Ephraim Syrus: Nineteen Hymns on the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh.
verses.text: Ocean of glory Who needest not to have Thy glory sung, take in Thy goodness this drop of praise; since by Thy Gift Thou hast supplied my tongue a sense for glorifying Thee.
